patterns: Smart Wait RPA Flow: Search -> Wait for Success/Fail/Limit/Timeout -> Act
gotchas: Fixed sleep times (deprecated in v1.3) replaced by wait_for_any_image
Confidence level of 0.8 optimized for text detection
Requires pyautogui, pyperclip, and tkcalendar installed via pip
Case 'Failed'/SĐT không tồn tại cần click friend_coords + Ctrl+A để dọn dẹp kết quả cũ trước khi tìm số tiếp theo
conventions: 3-Image states: Success (Số điện thoại:), Failed (Không tìm thấy), Rate Limit (Giới hạn)
Backspace Cleanup: Ctrl+A -> Backspace to ensure search field is empty
Success Delay: 300ms delay before clicking friend_coords
Residual Image Fix: Wait for fail image to disappear after cleanup to prevent skipping next contact
